title: MSU’s new ethics policy: Gag order or commonsense loyalty guide for trustees?
summary_en: Approved during a rare Sunday meeting, a new ethics policy is drawing criticism from those who say it violates free speech. But proponents say it’s necessary to outline expectations of trustees.
author: Kim Kozlowski
title_cn: MSU’s new ethics policy: Gag order or commonsense loyalty guide for trustees?
